---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new function, indicator, or capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like screamer to do?**
A clear description of the function or capability, and the problem it solves.

**Proposed API**
How you imagine calling it, if you have a preference:

```python
from screamer import NewThing
NewThing(window_size=20)(data)
```

**Reference / definition**
A formula, paper, or an existing implementation (NumPy/pandas/TA-Lib/...) that
defines the expected behavior. This also becomes the parity baseline.

**Additional context**
Anything else, e.g. whether it needs to work in streaming mode, multiple
inputs/outputs, etc.
